title: ClaudePlanSchema
description: Field mapping contract for parsing Claude-generated markdown plans into Gemini Kit task-schema format. Used by /gk-plan --from pipeline.

source.description: How to locate and parse Claude-generated plan files.

format.description: Input format. Always 'markdown' for Claude-generated plans.

entry_file.description: Top-level plan file name in the plan directory.

phase_pattern.description: Naming convention for phase files. NN = zero-padded sequence number.

required_sections.description: Sections required in plan.md for successful ingestion.

phase_field_mapping.description: Extraction rules mapping Claude phase markdown sections to task-schema fields.

taskId.description: Derived from phase filename numeric prefix. 'phase-01-setup.md' → taskId 'phase-01-001'.

command.description: H1 heading text of the phase file. Falls back to YAML frontmatter title if H1 absent.

agent.description: YAML frontmatter field 'agent:'. Required. Must match task-schema agent enum.

skill.description: YAML frontmatter field 'skill:'. Optional skill hint for the assigned agent.

priority.description: YAML frontmatter field 'priority:'. Defaults to 'P2' if absent.

status.description: YAML frontmatter field 'status:'. Maps directly to task-schema status enum.

blockedBy.description: YAML frontmatter field 'depends_on:'. Array of phase IDs e.g. ['phase-01']. Resolved to taskIds during CHR-4.

fileOwnership.description: File paths listed under '## Related Code Files' section (Create/Modify/Delete subsections). Each path becomes a glob entry.

success_criteria.description: Checklist items under '## Success Criteria' section. Stored as string array in task input.constraints.

plan_field_mapping.description: Extraction rules mapping plan.md top-level sections to plan metadata.

title.description: YAML frontmatter 'title:' or H1 heading of plan.md.

summary.description: YAML frontmatter 'description:' or first paragraph of '## Overview' section.

phases.description: Table rows under '## Phases' section. Each row provides phase number, status, and link to phase file.

validation.description: Validation rules applied during CHR-3 phase field validation.

required_phase_frontmatter.description: YAML frontmatter fields each phase file MUST declare for CHR-3 to pass.

required_phase_sections.description: Markdown section headers each phase file MUST contain for CHR-3 to pass.

agent_enum.description: Valid agent values. Mirrors task-schema agent enum for CHR-5 validation.

status_enum.description: Valid status values. Mirrors task-schema status enum for CHR-6 writeback.
